asymmetry: NHS dementia patients are being sedated and physically restrained in bed by the very system meant to care for them.
hook: The NHS is drugging your grandparents into silence.
core_fact: A landmark 18-month national review found dementia patients are routinely sedated and forcibly prevented from getting out of bed across NHS care settings in the UK.
villain: NHS care system and the institutional culture of neglect exposed in the national dementia care review.
share_trigger: Did you see this? They're sedating dementia patients just to keep them quiet — this could be YOUR nan.
search_query: NHS dementia patients sedated restrained care home abuse UK 2024 2025 report
